title: selaginella tylophora
intro: Selaginella tylophora, also known as spiny shield fern, is a type of plant species belonging to the genus Selaginella. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia, and its medicinal properties are attributed to its unique chemical composition. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
